title: Product Bio Intake
description: The locked intake contract for the Product Bio Engine (Skill 55). The four required fields are the only inputs the baked IP consumes (PRD §2.1/§3.3). prove_pb_intake.py enforces required-field presence fail-closed.

product_name.description: Exact product name (+ optional tagline/positioning). Consumed by chain 1.

product_description.description: What the product is/does + the transformation. Consumed by chain 1.

first_name.description: Founder/owner first name. Consumed by chain 1 + deliverable label.

last_name.description: Founder/owner last name. Consumed by chain 1 + deliverable label.

email.description: Optional; captured for handoff parity only (dormant in the LLM path).

phone.description: Optional; captured for handoff parity only (dormant in the LLM path).

word_count_override.description: Optional LOGGED client-exact override channel (tied to this locked brief). A client's exact word target wins VERBATIM over the SACRED 6,000-7,000 default band and is recorded on the certificate — never floored, capped, or substituted. prove_pb_wordcount.py honors it via --intake; an override applied but not logged here is AF-PB-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED (fail-closed).

section_count_overrides.description: Optional LOGGED per-section enumerated-count overrides {section_id: band}, honored only for the quantity bands (product_name/power_adjectives/objections/faqs/social_proof). The SACRED STRUCTURE (10 sections, order, 24 named closes, 7 StoryBrand beats) has NO override channel. Same logged-or-fail-closed rule as word_count_override.
